title: HazarMod
description: A mod that adds many new item materials and various items made from them
body:
# HazarMod

## 📖The mod contains📖:

### Metals:
- Steel
- Adomantium
- Obsidium

### Stones:
- Ganiy
- Yellow ganiy

### Wood:
- Wister
- Blue Oak
- Green cherry

### Other materials:
- Oxium
- Imperium

### Functional blocks:
- Enricher
- Remover
- Kovatlo

## ✅🌐Supported languages🌐❌:


- English ❌✅
- Russian ✅
- Spanish ❌
- French ❌
- Italian ❌

## 📖The mod contains📖:
The mod contains all sorts of materials, blocks, and many other things. It will add a bit of challenge to the world and more advanced materials for armor and tools. Build, develop, craft, and enjoy the game, player.
